column1: # Vendors that are not in the USB-IF registered list or the usb.ids
# community list, but have a clearly identifiable owner based on the
# cables that ship with the VID. Used to give cables a recognisable
# brand name in the app. The "not USB-IF registered" trust signal is
# preserved because these rows go in with source='manual', not
#   - Multiple cables in data/known-cables.md share the VID
#   - All known cables with that VID are from the same brand
#   - The VID is not in usbif-vendors.tsv or the usb.ids community list
# Format: <hex VID with or without 0x prefix>\t<vendor name>
# Lines beginning with # are comments. Blank lines are ignored.
# VID 0x01B6 is CalDigit's Thunderbolt-class identifier (separate from
# their USB-IF VID 0x2188 / 8584). Documented across issues #89, #90,
# 0x01B6 is CalDigit-branded (TB4 Pro, TB5 Pro, TS5 Plus bundled).
